feature_name: Sidebar: move My Day to scrollable zone and apply three-zone layout on desktop

tasks.title: Move My Day to scrollable zone and apply three-zone layout universally
tasks.description: Two fixes in Sidebar.svelte: (1) Remove My Day from sidebar-zone-top and render all sidebarLists items in sidebar-zone-lists without filtering. (2) Move the three-zone flexbox layout from the mobile media query into base styles so it applies at all screen sizes.
tasks.done_when: My Day appears in the scrollable middle zone on both mobile and desktop. The frozen top zone contains only the title row, section label, and sort controls. The three-zone flexbox layout is active at all viewport widths. All quality gates pass: lint, check, test, test:e2e:smoke.

history.note: Patch task initialized for sidebar zone fixes
Routed T1 to SDE: My Day zone fix + desktop three-zone layout

T1 built: moved My Day from sidebar-zone-top into sidebar-zone-lists alongside all other lists; applied three-zone flexbox layout to base styles (not just mobile media query); .sidebar now overflow:hidden, .sidebar-main has height:100%, zones get flex layout universally. All quality gates pass.
